---
title: "main-functions"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{main-functions}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

```{r setup}
library(measlesr)
```


```{r}
#| label: country summary

# this function returns the top or  bottom 10 countries with total measles cases
# two parameters, year (int - 2012-2025) and top (TRUE = top, FALSE = bottom)
measles_summary_table(measles_data, 2022, top = TRUE)

```

```{r}

```

```{r}


```
